title: Gorgeous Sweet Ukrainian Pancakes
description: A sweet and creamy Ukrainian dish featuring pancakes, perfect for midnight cravings, with a Jain-friendly twist and no animal by-products, instead using plant based alternatives to pancetta and bonito-shave.

ingredients.name: smoked tofu
ingredients.notes: crumbled, as a substitute for pancetta

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, milk, maple syrup, and melted vegan butter to form a smooth batter.
Add apple sauce, crumbled smoked tofu, nutritional yeast, and vanilla extract to the batter and mix until well combined.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat and grease with a small amount of vegan butter.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the batter into the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes or until bubbles appear on the surface.
Flip the pancakes and cook for another 1-2 minutes or until golden brown.
Serve the pancakes hot with your favorite toppings, such as fresh fruit or whipped cream.
Repeat the cooking process until all the batter is used up.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
